name: IDACORP, Inc.
description: IDACORP, Inc. is an electricity holding company based in Boise, Idaho. Through its principal subsidiary, Idaho Power Company, it is engaged in the generation, transmission, distribution, purchase, and sale of electric energy. Idaho Power serves customers across southern Idaho and eastern Oregon, utilizing a diverse generation portfolio that includes a significant share of clean, reliable hydroelectric power. IDACORP also holds interests in IDACORP Financial and Ida-West Energy.
